summary: Affiliate Program (Phase 1) testing completed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified. Referral validation endpoints (by code and user ID), admin analytics endpoints (summary, events with time ranges), user referral stats/activity, signup with ref_code, and referral URL capture all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/referrals/validate/{ref} correctly validates by referral code (KLYYBMTS) returning valid=true with referrer info
GET /api/referrals/validate/{ref} correctly validates by user ID and auto-creates referral code if needed
GET /api/referrals/validate/{ref} returns valid=false for invalid codes
POST /api/auth/register with ref_code creates referral linkage (referrer gets +1 total_signups)
POST /api/auth/register with invalid ref_code still creates user successfully (graceful failure)
GET /api/referrals/stats returns referral_code, total_referrals, tier, commission_rate, total_earnings for authenticated user
GET /api/referrals/activity returns referral activity list for authenticated user
GET /api/referrals/admin/summary returns total_referrals, top_referrers, commissions with admin_key
GET /api/referrals/admin/events?range=today|7d|30d returns totals and daily breakdown
Admin referral endpoints require admin_key (403 without it, 422 for missing param)
POST /api/referrals/track-click tracks referral clicks for valid codes
GET /api/referrals/validate-code validates existing referral code format
Anti-fraud: duplicate referrals correctly rejected
Referral page at /referrals shows user referral link with copy button (data-testid='referral-link-input')
Referral page shows stats cards (Total Referrals, Active Users, Earnings, Conversion Rate)
Referral page shows Reward Tiers (Starter 20%, Builder 25%, Champion 30%, Legend 35%)
Admin Analytics tab shows Affiliate Performance section (data-testid='admin-referral-analytics')
Admin Analytics shows summary cards: Total Referrals (8), Active Subs (0), Revenue ($0.00), Commissions Owed ($17.40)
Admin Analytics shows Referral Signups chart (data-testid='referral-signups-chart')
Admin Analytics shows Signups vs Conversions chart (data-testid='referral-conversions-chart')
Admin Analytics shows Top Referrers table (data-testid='top-referrers-table') with KLYYBMTS code visible
Admin Analytics range selector (data-testid='referral-range-select') works with Today/7d/30d options
Referral URL capture: ?ref=KLYYBMTS correctly stores code in localStorage and cleans URL
Existing signup/login flows still work without ref_code
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests: test_ref_*, test_invalid_ref_*, test_no_ref_* (all with unique UUIDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate Program Phase 1 fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/referrals/validate/{ref} (validates by code OR user ID), /api/referrals/admin/summary, /api/referrals/admin/events?range=today|7d|30d. All require admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026 for admin endpoints. Frontend: Referral page at /referrals, Admin Analytics tab has Affiliate Performance section. Referral URL capture uses localStorage key 'alphaai_referral_code'. Pro user demo_test2 has referral code KLYYBMTS with 8 total referrals.

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Referral page loads with data-testid='referral-page'

mocked_apis.note: All referral APIs are fully functional. Admin Analytics shows synthetic data when DEMO_MODE=true (expected behavior).
